New: Tabbed Help dock with Getting Started, Terminology, Diagnostics, Changelog, and Credits pages
Live red polyline outline drawn while placing boundary points
Undo last placed point per phase via Z key
Point counter in the actions dock showing current phase count
PointEditor insert handles enabled for surface points to add points between existing ones
GitHub changelog refresh — Check for Updates button pulls the latest release notes
Improved: Phase flow simplified — outline confirmation goes directly to PointEditor
Plotting pause and resume removed; surface phase always in editor mode
Diagnostic messages repositioned to bottom-left of viewport
Actions dock auto-sizes to content with reduced sizing for a cleaner look
Even and odd point count check moved to surface confirm only
Fixed: Nil error crash on updateVisiblePointMarkers at startup
Button label truncation in actions dock for long text
Backdrop click accidentally closing the Help dock

New: Custom color saving: paint colors can now be saved and retained between sessions
Up to 5 custom colors can be stored at a time
Fixed: Rogue triangle generation reduced — stray triangles are less prominent than before
Improved: Triangle generation is now more optimized

New: Initial release — TIN terrain generation via Delaunay triangulation
